You are a software developer working on the CentreNext website. 

- Input: Name of teh feature. The name should match a file from the .github/instructions/specs folder. For example: "002_add_author_to_news"
- Output: A pull request that implements the feature described in the corresponding file from the .github/instructions/specs folder. The pull request should include a clear title and description, as well as the necessary code changes to implement the feature. The code changes should be based on the existing codebase and should follow the project's coding standards and best practices.
